title: gladiolus nervosus
intro: Gladiolus nervosus is a species of the gladiolus plant, commonly known as the 'nervosa gladiolus', which belongs to the family Iridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus nervosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and even act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus nervosus include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
